description: PHASE 3: Contracts & Renters - Backend APIs for renter profiles, contracts with PDF export, and frontend pages. Covers TASK-009, TASK-010, and TASK-011.
steps: Create backend/app/models/renter.py with Pydantic models: RenterCreate, RenterUpdate, RenterResponse, RenterDetailResponse
Create backend/app/services/renter_service.py with CRUD: list (filter search, has_active_contract), create, get_detail (with contracts history), update, upload_id_photo (Supabase Storage)
Create backend/app/routers/renters.py with endpoints: GET/POST /renters, GET/PATCH /renters/{id}, POST /renters/{id}/invite, POST /renters/{id}/id-front, POST /renters/{id}/id-back
Create backend/app/models/contract.py with Pydantic models: ContractCreate, ContractUpdate, ContractResponse, ContractDetailResponse

Create backend/app/services/contract_service.py with: list, create (auto-generate contract_number HD-YYYY-NNN, reject if unit has active contract), get, update (only draft), activate (draft->active, set unit occupied), terminate (active->terminated, set unit vacant), export_pdf (WeasyPrint+Jinja2), expiring_soon (30 days)

Create backend/app/routers/contracts.py with endpoints: GET/POST /contracts, GET/PATCH /contracts/{id}, POST /contracts/{id}/activate, POST /contracts/{id}/terminate, POST /contracts/{id}/export-pdf, GET /contracts/expiring-soon
Create backend/app/templates/contract_template.html - Vietnamese rental contract HTML template with Jinja2 variables, A4 CSS, Be Vietnam Pro font
Register renters and contracts routers in main.py
Create frontend/src/pages/contracts/ContractListPage.tsx with table, status badges (draft=gray, active=green, expired=red, terminated=orange), expiring warning row highlight
Create frontend/src/pages/contracts/ContractFormPage.tsx with multi-step form: Step 1 select vacant unit, Step 2 select/create renter, Step 3 contract details, Step 4 preview + actions
Create frontend/src/pages/contracts/ContractDetailPage.tsx with header, status badge, action buttons, 2-column info, timeline progress bar, PDF download
Create frontend/src/pages/renters/RenterDetailPage.tsx with avatar, 2-column info, ID photo upload, tabs
Add contract and renter routes to App.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Backend renter and contract endpoints are importable without errors
Contract number auto-generation logic follows HD-YYYY-NNN format
Contract activation updates unit status to occupied
PDF export template exists with proper Jinja2 variables
Frontend builds with multi-step contract form and renter management pages
Search functionality in RenterListPage uses debounced input
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.routers.renters import router; from app.routers.contracts import router; print('OK')"
